din125i.source: variant key sharing DIN 125 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din126i.source: variant key sharing DIN 126 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din127p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 127; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din128a.source: DIN 128 Form A is the base curved spring washer; this key aliases it.

din137a.source: DIN 137 A (M12, curved/domed spring washer, gewölbt; d1=13, d2=24, s=1.2, continuous ring with no split). Reuses curved_washer with gap_deg=0. Dome height representative (free height ~3 mm; DIN envelope 2.5-5 mm) — the cone tilt is chosen to sit in that range, not a published value.

din1440.source: DIN 1440 (pin Ø12 / M12, medium washer for bolts and pins; d1=12, d2=25, s=3). Dimensions from Fasteners.eu.

din1440i.source: variant key sharing DIN 1440 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din2093.source: DIN 2093 (disc spring / Belleville, representative; nominal, unverified)

din2093d.source: variant key for the DIN 2093 disc spring; identical geometry, aliased to the base.

din432.source: DIN 432 (M12, external nose lock washer; d2=30, s=1.2, nose width 4.5; nose length representative)

din432p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 432; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din433i.source: variant key sharing DIN 433 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din434.source: DIN 434 (M12, square taper washer for U-channel, 8% slope, 26x30, s 2.5->4.9)

din434p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 434; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din435.source: DIN 435 (M12, square taper washer for I-beam flanges; a=20.1, s 4.1->6.2)

din435p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 435; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din436p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 436; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din462.source: DIN 462 (M12, internal tab lock washer; d1=12, d2=28, s=0.8, tab 5x9.3, bent up at the bore)

din462p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 462; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din463.source: DIN 463 (M12, two-tab lock washer, long+short; d2=30, s=1; tab lengths representative; standard withdrawn)

din463p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 463; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din6319c.source: DIN 6319 Form C (M12, Kugelscheibe / spherical washer; d1=13, d3=24, h2=4, flat top with convex spherical underside). Mating sphere radius representative (~26 mm): DIN tables publish it inconsistently, chosen to seat in the Form D/G cup.

din6319d.source: DIN 6319 Form D (M12, Kegelpfanne / conical seat; d2=13, d3=24, h3=3, flat bottom with concave spherical recess receiving the Form C washer). Mating sphere radius representative (~26 mm), same as Form C.

din6340.source: DIN 6340 (M12, washer for clamping fixtures / Scheiben für Spannzeuge, heavy; d1=13, d2=35, s=5). Dimensions from Fasteners.eu / Ganter tables.

din6340d.source: variant key for DIN 6340; identical geometry, aliased to the base.

din6796.source: DIN 6796 (M12 conical spring washer; nominal, unverified)

din6797a.source: DIN 6797 A (M12, external tooth / Zahnscheibe, 10 teeth)

din6797j.source: DIN 6797 J (M12, internal tooth / Innenzahn, 10 teeth)

din6798a.source: DIN 6798 A (M12, external serrated / Fächerscheibe, min 16 teeth)

din6798d.source: catalog 'Form D' label is not a real DIN 6798 form; its geometry is Form V, so this aliases din6798v.

din6798j.source: DIN 6798 J (M12, internal serrated / Fächerscheibe, min 16 teeth)

din6798v.source: DIN 6798 V (M12, countersunk external serrated / Senkzahn, min 18 teeth, 90° head)

din6916i.source: variant key sharing DIN 6916 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din7349.source: DIN 7349 (M12, thick washer for clamping sleeves)

din7349d.source: DIN 7349 (M12, heavy thick washer for bolts with heavy clamping sleeves; d1=13, d2=30, s=6). Dimensions from Fasteners.eu.

din7603d.source: DIN 7603 (12x18, sealing ring / Dichtring, copper/aluminium; d1=12, d2=18). Thickness representative (form/material dependent, commonly 1.0-1.5 mm; 1.5 chosen).

din7980.source: DIN 7980 (M12, spring lock washer for cylinder-head screws; d1=12.2, d2=18, section 2.5, split ring)

din7980p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 7980; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din9021i.source: variant key sharing DIN 9021 geometry; the app already serves it the base drawing, so this aliases the base.

din93.source: DIN 93 (M12, one-tab lock washer; d2=30, s=1, tab width 12; tab length representative)

din93p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of DIN 93; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

din988d.source: DIN 988 (12x18, shim ring / Passscheibe; d1=12, d2=18). Thickness representative (DIN 988 is a shim series 0.1-2 mm; a mid 1.0 mm ring is drawn).

iso7089p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7089; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso7091p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7091; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso7092p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7092; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso7093p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7093; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso7094.source: ISO 7094 (M12, extra large series; nominal, unverified)

iso7094p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7094; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso7416p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 7416; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.

iso8738.source: ISO 8738 (size 12, plain washer for clevis pins, dimensionally equivalent to DIN 1440; d1=12, d2=25, s=3).

iso8738p.source: plated (electro-zinc) variant of ISO 8738; plating does not change geometry, so this aliases the base drawing.
